source.authority: Federal Legal Information System of Austria
source.scope: Official-source-backed Austria calendar-year 2026 ordinary annual income-tax tariff.

AT.notes: Annual tariff tax under the official 0%, 20%, 30%, 40%, 48%, 50% and temporary 55% schedule on caller-confirmed taxable income. Credits, special-rate income and withholding remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 ordinary annual tariff tax on caller-confirmed taxable income.
